title: urtica urens var. iners
intro: Urtica urens var. iners, commonly known as lesser nettle or small nettle, is a variety of nettle plant that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and urinary issues. The health benefits of Urtica urens var. iners include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Urtica urens var. iners include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steaming the leaves and flowers, or by drying and powdering them for later use.
